summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of La Casa HP&E Archive static HTML site with Supabase integration. All pages load correctly and navigation works properly. Found minor JavaScript issues with Supabase client initialization affecting form submission.

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript error: 'Identifier supabase has already been declared' prevents successful form submission
Login error message element exists but doesn't display properly on invalid credentials

integration_issues.issue: Only shows 1 slide, likely due to Supabase connection issues or no featured data

passed_tests: Homepage loads with navigation, hero section, and featured carousel container
Collections page loads with search input and filter buttons working
Map page loads with interactive Leaflet map showing 11 campus markers
Timeline page loads with horizontal scrollable timeline functionality
Groups page loads with 6 group cards displayed correctly
Mission page loads with mission text and feature items
Submit page loads with all form fields and proper validation
Admin page shows secure login form with email/password fields
Navigation links work correctly between all pages
Admin button visible and accessible at bottom of each page
Form field validation working (required fields, email format)
Map markers clickable with popup information
Filter buttons on collections page working
Search input on collections page accepting input
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript error in submit.html where Supabase client is being declared multiple times. This is preventing form submissions from working properly. Also fix login error message display in admin.html.
